reviewer_summary.summary: The skill demonstrates sensitive file access, shell execution, and network behavior.
reviewer_summary.suggested_decision: Block or isolate before manual approval

suggested_decision: Block or isolate before manual approval

summary_cards.label: Risk Score
summary_cards.description: Overall risk score calculated from static and dynamic evidence.

summary_cards.label: Risk Level
summary_cards.description: The skill shows multiple suspicious behaviors.

timeline_events.message: Attempted to access a sensitive file.

static_findings.title: Shell execution detected
static_findings.explanation: The skill contains code that can execute shell commands.
static_findings.recommendation: Avoid shell=True and restrict command execution.

static_findings.title: Sensitive path reference
static_findings.explanation: The skill references a common SSH private key path.
static_findings.recommendation: Block access to user secret paths during skill execution.

dynamic_findings.title: Sensitive file access attempt
dynamic_findings.explanation: The skill attempted to access a sensitive file during execution.
dynamic_findings.recommendation: Run skills in a sandbox with a restricted filesystem.

dynamic_findings.title: Network connection attempt
dynamic_findings.explanation: The skill attempted to contact an external host.
dynamic_findings.recommendation: Disable network access by default unless explicitly required.

rule_findings.title: Shell execution detected
rule_findings.explanation: Shell execution can allow command injection or unwanted system access.
rule_findings.recommendation: Replace shell execution with allowlisted commands.

rule_findings.title: Sensitive file access attempt
rule_findings.explanation: Access to private keys may lead to credential leakage.
rule_findings.recommendation: Deny access to SSH keys, API keys, token files, and environment secrets.

recommendations: Block this skill until manual review is completed.
Run only in a restricted sandbox.
Deny access to SSH keys, .env files, token files, and credential stores.
Require explicit approval before enabling shell execution.
notes: This dashboard data is demo data for level3.1 security review visualization.
Do not present this demo as a verified VM Mode C execution result.
